moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships continue through to the Men's and Ladies' Singles Finals this weekend, running from June 29 to July 12.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: It's finals week at Wimbledon! Who are you backing to lift the trophies on Centre Court this weekend?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Are British hopes still alive at Wimbledon? Catch all the action as the tournament heads into its thrilling conclusion.

moments.title: Tour de France Battle
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France is well underway, having started on July 4th in Barcelona and continuing until July 26th.

angles.name: Cycling Thrills
angles.copy: The Tour de France peloton is battling through the mountains! Who's looking strong for the yellow jersey?

angles.name: Stage by Stage
angles.copy: Another day, another gruelling stage in the Tour de France. Keep up with all the twists and turns from France!

moments.title: Wireless Festival Takes Over London
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival returns to Finsbury Park, London from July 10-12, with Ye (Kanye West) headlining all three days.

angles.name: Wireless Weekend
angles.copy: Wireless Festival is almost here! Finsbury Park is about to go off with Ye headlining three nights. Who's got tickets?

angles.name: Ye's Return
angles.copy: Ye is set to dominate Wireless Festival this weekend, headlining all three days. What tracks are you hoping to hear?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Approaching
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival celebrates its 20th anniversary at Henham Park, Suffolk from July 23-26, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: 20 Years of Latitude
angles.copy: Celebrating 20 years of Latitude! Henham Park is gearing up for David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi from July 23-26. Who's joining the party?

angles.name: Diverse Lineup
angles.copy: From Talking Heads legend David Byrne to pop sensation Lewis Capaldi, Latitude Festival has a stacked lineup for its 20th anniversary. What artists are on your must-see list?

moments.title: Love Island Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, which began on June 1st, continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, bringing daily drama from the Mallorca villa.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island drama! Who's coupled up and who's on the rocks?

angles.name: Catch Up on Love Island
angles.copy: Missed last night's Love Island? Catch up on all the villa action on ITVX before tonight's episode!

moments.title: Ringo Starr Turns 86
moments.blurb: Today, July 7th, is the 86th birthday of legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr, born in 1940.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo
angles.copy: Peace and love! Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo?

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: From Liverpool to global superstardom, Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today. A true legend of rock and roll!

moments.title: Kevin Bacon's 68th Birthday
moments.blurb: Actor and musician Kevin Bacon, known for his roles and as part of The Bacon Brothers, turns 68 on July 8th.

angles.name: Six Degrees of Bacon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Kevin Bacon turns 68! Celebrate by connecting him to your favourite song in six degrees or less.

angles.name: Musical Talent
angles.copy: Beyond the silver screen, Kevin Bacon is a talented musician with The Bacon Brothers. Wishing him a happy 68th birthday tomorrow!

moments.title: Jack White Turns 51
moments.blurb: Influential rock musician Jack White, frontman of The White Stripes and The Raconteurs, celebrates his 51st birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 51st birthday to the incomparable Jack White! What's your favourite White Stripes or Raconteurs track?

angles.name: Modern Rock Legend
angles.copy: From 'Seven Nation Army' to his solo work, Jack White has shaped modern rock. Wishing him a fantastic 51st birthday!

moments.title: Courtney Love's 62nd Birthday
moments.blurb: Hole frontwoman and rock icon Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Grunge Queen
angles.copy: Happy 62nd birthday to the fierce and iconic Courtney Love! What's your favourite Hole anthem?

angles.name: 90s Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of grunge legend Courtney Love. Her impact on 90s rock is undeniable!

moments.title: Liz Mitchell (Boney M.) Turns 74
moments.blurb: Liz Mitchell, the lead singer of the iconic disco group Boney M., turns 74 on July 12th.

angles.name: Boney M. Legend
angles.copy: On July 12th, we're wishing a very happy 74th birthday to Liz Mitchell, the voice of Boney M.! What's your favourite track from them?

angles.name: Disco Icon
angles.copy: Get ready to dance! Liz Mitchell of Boney M. celebrates her 74th birthday this Friday. 'Rivers of Babylon' or 'Daddy Cool'?

moments.title: Gareth Gates Turns 42
moments.blurb: Pop Idol runner-up and chart-topping singer Gareth Gates celebrates his 42nd birthday on July 12th.

angles.name: Pop Idol Flashback
angles.copy: Remember 'Unchained Melody'? Gareth Gates turns 42 on Friday! What was your favourite song from his Pop Idol days?

angles.name: 00s Pop Star
angles.copy: From reality TV to musical theatre, Gareth Gates has had an amazing career. Happy 42nd birthday to the 00s pop favourite!

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt's 80th Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer Linda Ronstadt, a versatile artist across rock, country, and folk, turns 80 on July 15th.

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 80th birthday to the incredible Linda Ronstadt on July 15th! Her voice is timeless.

angles.name: Versatile Voice
angles.copy: From rock to country, Linda Ronstadt mastered every genre. Celebrate her 80th birthday with a listen to her greatest hits!

moments.title: Fatboy Slim Turns 63
moments.blurb: Norman Cook, better known as DJ Fatboy Slim, the pioneer of big beat music, celebrates his 63rd birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: Big Beat Birthday
angles.copy: Right here, right now! Happy 63rd birthday to the legendary Fatboy Slim on July 16th. What's your favourite track to get you moving?

angles.name: 90s Dance Icon
angles.copy: From Brighton Beach to global stages, Fatboy Slim defined a sound. Wishing Norman Cook a massive happy 63rd birthday!

moments.title: Natasha Hamilton (Atomic Kitten) Turns 44
moments.blurb: Atomic Kitten singer Natasha Hamilton celebrates her 44th birthday on July 17th.

angles.name: Atomic Birthday
angles.copy: It's gonna be alright! Wishing a very happy 44th birthday to Atomic Kitten's Natasha Hamilton on July 17th.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: From 'Whole Again' to her solo career, Natasha Hamilton has been a pop staple. Happy 44th birthday next Friday!

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Start
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays are either already underway in Scotland and Northern Ireland, or about to begin in England and Wales from July 20th.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: The summer holidays are here (or almost here!) for schools across the UK! What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Family Fun Time
angles.copy: School's out for summer in Wales! Time for family adventures and making memories. What local spots are you visiting?
